name: cf-base
description: Boilerplate multi-empresa SaaS — Cloudflare Workers + SvelteKit + Hono

scripts.deploy:web:full: pnpm --filter web run build && pnpm --filter web run deploy
scripts.deploy:api:full: pnpm --filter api run build && pnpm --filter api run deploy
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm --filter api run deploy:staging && pnpm --filter web run build && pnpm --filter web run deploy:staging
scripts.deploy:production: pnpm --filter api run deploy:production && pnpm --filter web run build && pnpm --filter web run deploy:production
